title: Supply Chain Security with a CLI: valint

resources.title: Valint Installation Script
resources.evidence_quote: You can grab it from get.scrapesecurity.com/install.sh, where if you put that through a shell, you will get your Valant in your local directory.

resources.title: Scribe Security JFrog Container Registry
resources.evidence_quote: Or you can pull the Valiant container image from their JFrog instance, which is scrapesecurity.jfrog.i0/scrape-docker-public-local/valiant latest.
